title: lotus campylocladus subsp. hillebrandii
intro: Lotus campylocladus subsp. hillebrandii, also known as the Hawaiian lotus or Hilo lotus, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the genus Lotus. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lotus campylocladus subsp. hillebrandii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In traditional Hawaiian herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by making a tea or infusion from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
